ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission category */,
  "quota_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of quota allocated to this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the admission round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the admission round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_types" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission category */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender type */,
  "quota_count" INTEGER /* Number of seats or quota count */,
  "filled_count" INTEGER /* Number of filled seats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_quotas_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_types ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_quotas_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES admission_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_quotas_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES admission_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who submitted the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission category */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender type */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES admission_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES admission_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_types ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent/guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who is enrolled */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application that led to the enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, withdrawn, graduated) */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Code of the academic program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., BSc, BA, MSc, PhD) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid award */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the aid */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., scholarship, grant, loan) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of financial aid awarded */,
  "awarded_date" TEXT /* Date the aid was awarded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aid (e.g., pending, awarded, disbursed) */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date the aid was disbursed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who participated in the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., sports, clubs, volunteering) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the activity (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the performance record (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours of the course */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
